identity.mission: Create the ultimate modern community hub for French-speaking streamers and viewers.
identity.aesthetic: Dark Mode Gamer, Neon Glassmorphism, Twitch/Discord Hybrid

typography.instructions: Import 'Outfit' and 'Plus Jakarta Sans' from Google Fonts in index.css. Use Outfit for all Headings and Nav items. Use Plus Jakarta Sans for body text.

layout.grid_system: Use 'Bento' grids (CSS Grid) for dashboard and home. Gap-4 to Gap-6.
layout.navigation: Sidebar on Desktop (collapsible), Bottom Bar or Burger on Mobile. Sticky Header with blur.

buttons.primary: rounded-lg font-semibold transition-all duration-300 shadow-neon hover:scale-105 active:scale-95

cards.default: rounded-xl border border-white/5 bg-[#121214] overflow-hidden hover:border-violet-500/30 transition-all duration-300

inputs.style: bg-[#18181B] border-white/10 focus:border-violet-500 focus:ring-violet-500/20 rounded-md placeholder:text-gray-500

badges.base: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wide

universal_guidelines.dark_mode_only: The app is primarily Dark Mode. Do not prioritize light mode styles unless requested.
universal_guidelines.interactive_elements: All interactive elements must have a distinct hover state (color change, glow, or scale).
universal_guidelines.accessibility: Ensure text contrast ratios (4.5:1 minimum). Use lighter grays (e.g., #A1A1AA) for secondary text, never dark gray on black.
universal_guidelines.border_radius: Use 'rounded-xl' for cards and 'rounded-lg' for buttons/inputs to maintain a modern, friendly but techy look.
universal_guidelines.spacing_philosophy: Generous padding inside cards (p-6). Tight gaps in data grids, loose gaps in content lists.
universal_guidelines.icons: Use lucide-react. Stroke width 1.5px or 2px. Size 16px-24px usually.
universal_guidelines.testing: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.

instructions_to_main_agent: Set up Tailwind colors in tailwind.config.js using the specified hex codes.
Create a 'Layout' component that handles the Sidebar/Header structure.
Use 'Outfit' font for all headings. Import it via Google Fonts in index.css.
Implement the 'Glassmorphism' utility classes in index.css or tailwind config.
Build 'Badge' components for Admin/Modo/Streamer roles using the specified colors.
Use the provided image URLs for placeholders in the UI.
